description: Black woven jacket, has a spread collar, hood attached with press button closure on the front, concealed full zip closure on the front and Velcro closure, full length panelled sleeves with elasticated hem, Adidas patented stripes on the shoulder extending to the sleeves, contrast embroidered branding on the left side of the chest, two insert pockets on either side of the waist, mesh lining, inner toggle drawstring fastening on the hem
